message:
feat(fcp-testkit): add live-suite infrastructure for non-mock acceptance testing

Add the shared operational layer for live/nightly connector suites:
- LiveGate: environment-variable-gated test enablement by tier
  (local, sandbox, device, read-only, write)
- SecretBag: centralized credential loading from env vars, files, or
  test defaults with missing-secret reporting
- CostBudget: per-run spending limits with atomic tracking and JSONL
  evidence summaries
- SyntheticTenant: deterministic fcp-test-{connector}-{suffix}-{date}
  resource naming with stale-resource detection
- CleanupGuard: LIFO cleanup actions with panic-safe execution
- EnvironmentManifest: machine-readable per-connector live-suite
  declarations with secret requirements, rate limits, and budgets
- LiveEnvironment: convenience wrapper combining all pieces

Includes 30+ tests covering gates, secrets, budgets, tenants, cleanup,
manifests, and environment validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
